svg.text: ARTIST 5 -- THE LOCOMOTION CAST -- nine creatures, nine ways of getting around
One dominant solid per creature; the machinery of its locomotion is the only thing allowed to break the outline. Judged at 18 and 32.
THE GATE -- ALL NINE AS FLAT BLACK, TRUE SIZE (halo included, because the halo is what closes a notch)
SIZE LADDER -- 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 px tall, both frames, on deep space; then 18 / 32 on terrain (the hard background)
4x INSPECTION -- 128 px tall (four times game size). For editing only; nothing is approved from this row.
MATRIX -- 4 player colors x 3 backgrounds, frame 1, all at 32 px tall (true game size)
DOCK BADGES -- the face crop at 18 px (the size the dock draws) and at 56 px. The mule has no face and no badge.
